LanguageData.FB_PitBurrowCall_QuestDescription: A slow, living pulse has begun to echo through the colony. It does not sound in the air; it presses through soil, bone, and sleep, calling you toward something buried below.\n\nYou can answer the call and allow a flesh burrow to open within the colony. If you ignore it, nothing will emerge.
LanguageData.FB_PitBurrowCall_SpawnFailed: The call faded before a flesh burrow could find a place to emerge.
